programme.desc: Behind the scenes on the record-breaking 40,000 nautical mile race around the world on 70-foot ocean racing yachts. Follow the inside story of what they go through to take part.(n)

programme.desc: Follow Heidi as she discovers life's ups and downs. She lights up and soothes the people and animals all around her, with her enthusiastic, generous and wonderful zest for life.(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The band suffers a run of mishaps while in Acapulco, and discovers that a shaman has accidentally cursed them with bad luck.(n)

programme.title: K3
programme.desc: The girls attend the unveiling of their waxworks at a London museum - but a set of mystical bracelets bring the models to life.(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Halvar's ship runs aground in the fog and a rival crew steals his loot. Vic tries to get the treasure back by convincing the thieves it has been cursed by the god of thunder.(n)

programme.title: Vic the Viking
programme.desc: Vic tries to scare off the tax collector by tricking him into thinking there are monsters lurking near the village.(n)

programme.title: In the Doghouse (1961)
programme.desc: a newly qualified vet struggles to compete against an unscrupulous rival. Comedy, starring Leslie Phillips, Peggy Cummins, Hattie Jacques and James Booth.(n)

programme.title: High Treason (1951)
programme.desc: Officers of MI5 and Special branch join forces to deal with a wave of sabotage attacks that have been sweeping the nation. Spy thriller, starring Liam Redmond and Andre Morell.(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Short visual tours exploring and revealing lesser known areas of London for locals and tourists. Narrated by Dewyne Lindsay.(n)

programme.title: The Bionic Vet
programme.desc: Veterinary surgeon Noel Fitzpatrick treats a Labrador whose cancer is eating away its front leg, by replacing its tumour with a custom-made implant, and uses the same technique to save the knee of a border collie. Senior surgeon Michael Hamilton also tends a chinchilla that needs urgent treatment on its arm bones after falling from a shelf.(n)

programme.title: London Districts
programme.desc: Exploring the districts of Woolwich, Plumstead and Deptford.(n)

programme.title: Horizon
programme.sub-title: Horizon: Should I Eat Meat? - The Big Health Dilemma
programme.desc: In the first of two programmes this week investigating the truth about meat, Michael Mosley asks if those summer barbecue favourites - burgers and sausages - are as bad as some people think. He puts the latest scientific findings to the test on a high-meat diet to discover whether eating beef and bacon every day will do him any harm.(n)

programme.title: Storyville
programme.sub-title: Storyville: The Great European Disaster Movie
programme.desc: Drama-documentary by director Annalisa Piras and former editor of the Economist Bill Emmott, which explores the possible socioeconomic crisis facing Europe. Through case studies of citizens in different countries, the film explores a range of factors that have led to the current climate and challenges across the continent, and includes fictional scenes, set in a post-EU future, which feature an archaeologist (played by Angus Deayton) travelling on a flight through a storm and explaining to a young passenger what the European Union was.(n)

programme.title: The Face of Love (2013)
programme.desc: A widow begins a new relationship with a man who is the exact double of her husband, and shares many of his personality traits. Over time, she grows to love his own unique qualities, but fears he will leave her if he ever discovers the resemblance. Romantic drama, starring Annette Bening, Ed Harris and Robin Williams.(n)

programme.title: Hot Property (2016)
programme.desc: A corporate spy loses her job after getting caught embezzling, and is no longer able to fund her lavish lifestyle. Faced with being evicted from her rented home, she puts all her skills of deception into fending off the landlord, replacement tenants and a psychotic estate agent. Comedy, starring MyAnna Buring and Tom Rhys Harries.(n)

programme.title: Burning an Illusion (1981)
programme.desc: A black woman living in West London hopes to marry her boyfriend, but finds her life thrown into upheaval when he loses his job and is subsequently arrested after getting into a fight. The experience makes her reassess her priorities, and she decides to reconnect with her African heritage. Drama, starring Cassie McFarlane and Victor Romero Evans.(n)

programme.title: Walks Around Britain
programme.desc: Andrew White walks along the cliffs at Flamborough Head and through Clumber Park, Nottinghamshire.(n)

programme.title: The October Man (1947)
programme.desc: A chemist with suicidal tendencies is falsely accused of murder - and his precarious mental state is further upset by taunts from the real killer. Psychological thriller, adapted from a novel by Eric Ambler, starring John Mills, Joan Greenwood and Joyce Carey.(n)

programme.title: Dear Murderer (1947)
programme.desc: A man believes he has committed the perfect crime when he kills his wife's two lovers in a jealous rage. Melodrama, starring Eric Portman, Dennis Price, Jack Warner, Greta Gynt and Hazel Court.(n)

programme.title: Love Birds ()
programme.desc: Short documentary about one of London's last working class pigeon racing communities.(n)

programme.title: The Queen's Palaces
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce explores the stories behind official royal residences, which act as family homes and places to conduct the business of monarchy, and charts the evolution of their architecture. She begins with Buckingham Palace and learns about its links to London sewers, its features including state rooms and a home for camels and elephants, plus how its chandeliers are cleaned.(n)

programme.title: British Gangsters: Faces of the Underworld
programme.desc: Bernard O'Mahoney looks at the effect of time on gangs and their origins, from bikers to Irish travellers, as their roots are dying out with every new generation.(n)

programme.title: Hallows Eve (2016)
programme.desc: Shadowy figures in masks begin appearing around an estate with a reputation for street crime, and leave behind graffiti warning of their intent to take over the area on Halloween. The members of a street gang vow to take a stand against the invaders, but are unprepared for the shocking truth behind their enemies' masks. Horror, starring Sarah Akokhia and Ethan Taylor.(n)

programme.title: The Great European Disaster Movie: Newsnight Debate
programme.desc: Robert Peston chairs a discussion in which a panel of guests debate the issues raised by the Storyville drama-documentary on the problems facing the European Union.(n)

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Rick Edwards hosts a game show in which the same 30 players compete for a daily prize of up to £1,500 and the chance to win £10,000. Every right answer takes them a step closer to a shot at that jackpot - but a single 'impossible' answer knocks them out for the day.(n)

programme.title: Weakest Link
programme.desc: Anne Robinson hosts the quick-fire general knowledge quiz where players answer questions to add to a prize pot, voting off who they think is the weakest link after each round.(n)

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Quiz show in which pairs of contestants try to score the fewest points possible by giving the least obvious correct answers to questions posed to 100 people before the show. At the end of each round, the team with the most points is eliminated until the final two pairs battle for the chance to compete for a cash prize. Presented by Alexander Armstrong and Richard Osman.(n)

programme.title: Strike It Lucky
programme.desc: Michael Barrymore hosts the madcap game show, in which three teams of two prove seek to progress along a board game-style path by answering questions. Each duo are allowed to determine how many spaces they would like to move by answering the corresponding number of questions. Landing on a space reveals it's hidden contents, which could amount to a prize, or a 'hot spot', which causes contestants to forfeit their gathered winnings.(n)
